column1: We____________to the park this evening. Do you want to come with us? (GO)
She________an article about crime in big cities. (WRITE)
He___________in his bedroom at the moment, but he can meet us at the cinema later. (STUDY)
I really have to go. My train____________at 8:30. (LEAVE)
Do you think she'll be here soon? The film__________in ten minutes. (START)
I_______________lunch today, so please don't be late. (COOK)
